query: SELECT cu.userId, u.email, cu.clientId, c.name, cu.role FROM client_users cu JOIN users u ON cu.userId = u.id JOIN clients c ON cu.clientId = c.id WHERE u.email = 'tbechtol@forneytx.gov';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT cu.userId, u.email, cu.clientId, c.name, cu.role FROM client_users cu JOIN users u ON cu.userId = u.id JOIN clients c ON cu.clientId = c.id WHERE u.email = 'tbechtol@forneytx.gov';
